calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2025 Off Calendar

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jun-20-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Dept: 505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 9:47:51 a.m. pausing at 9:48:29 a.m. resuming at 9:53:48 a.m., and concluding at 10:26:24 a.m.(D505)

Re: Motion for Default Judgment

Appearances
Ruby Zabien, Esq. representing Plaintiff Angel Fu who was present.
John Heller, Esq. co-counsel for Plaintiff.

Counsel summarizes the facts of the case and request for judgment.

Counsel examines Plaintiff. Plaintiff testifies and makes statements.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendant as follows:
The Plaintiff shall recover from the Defendant:

Damages $175,000.00
Pre-Judgment Interest at 10% $62,184.60
Costs $1,682.00
Attorney's Fees $0
Other $87,500 for emotional distress
Total Judgment $326,366.60

Proposed judgment to be submitted for review and signature of the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2025 Continued To Aug-27-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
